## Summary

What does this PR change?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Import / catalog operation
- [ ] Cover pipeline change
- [ ] Runtime / emulator change
- [ ] Restore / backup workflow

## Systems affected

- [ ] Homepage / categories
- [ ] NES / FC
- [ ] GBA
- [ ] GB / GBC
- [ ] PS1
- [ ] MAME
- [ ] Pokemon VN
- [ ] Admin
- [ ] Scripts / docs

## Risk check

- [ ] No secrets were committed
- [ ] No ROM / CHD bulk media was committed by mistake
- [ ] Config changes are documented
- [ ] If runtime files changed, I considered boot impact
- [ ] If import/restore logic changed, I updated docs

## Validation

List what you actually checked.

Examples:

```powershell
php scripts\audit_catalog_integrity.php
```

And/or manual checks:

- homepage loads
- one NES game boots
- one GBA game boots
- one PS1 game boots
- one MAME game boots

## Screenshots or notes

Add screenshots, error text, or important context if useful.
